title: MALACASA, Series Regular, 420ML Porcelain Bowl Set of 8, White Bowl for Cereal/Soup/Rice/Dessert/Breakfast/Salad,(12.8 * 12.8 * 6.5CM)
features: 【CLASSIC DESIGN】Small Bowls Set of 8. 90% Capacity: 420ML. Maximum Capacity: 470ML. Dimensions (each): 12.8x6.5 cm/ 5x2.6 inch. The small bowl set impresses with its ecological design with ivory white porcelain in a round shape. The new designed ivory white tone and classic round shape design make great all-purpose restaurant style bowl, the dessert bowls not only ideal for preparing delicious muesli and fruit, but also perfect for serving rice, ice cream etc.

【HEALTHY AND DURABLE】 Fired by high temperature, MALACASA small ivory white bowls are sturdy and safe to use in daily life. Resistant porcelain with a raised non-slip and thickened bottom. Robust enough to withstand the rigors of daily life. Also the bowls can be used for food storage in the refrigerator, or used to heat food in your microwave.

【STACKABLE AND EASY TO CLEAN】 MALACASA bowl set is designed so that it is accessible to everyone and can be used for all occasions. Thanks to their properties, they are not only stackable and space-saving, smooth glaze exterior that is uniform and easy to wash. They are also heat resistant, microwave / dishwasher safe

【MULTI-PURPOSE】Microwave-safe, oven-safe, dishwasher-safe, refrigerator-safe. This size white bowl set is great for serving entrees, sides, cereal, salad, snacks, rice, cut fruit & veggies, soups, desserts, home decoration and more.

【WORRY-FREE REPLACEMENT SUPER CUSTOMER SERVICE】 The product is not what you imagined or something broke during delivery? Don't worry, we promise free replacements if there are damaged or defective parts. As long as you write to us, we will give you an answer within 24 hours. NOTE: But make sure your mailbox is not blocking our email in case you cannot receive our reply.
